html:
Exclusive to:  

Sand is a resource found in the Shipwrecked DLC. Sand can be obtained by digging Sandy Piles found on the Beach biomes with a Shovel. Each use of Shovel will yield one pile of Sand, and full size Sandy Piles can be dug twice. Sandy Piles regenerate over time, making Sand renewable. Sand is an important resource early in the game, as it is required for crafting Chimineas, Buoyant Chimineas and Sandbags, which are structures that greatly help in surviving Hurricane Season and Monsoon Season respectively. It can also be used to craft a Sand Castle or a Sea Lab. Sand can also be refined into Empty Bottles.

Strong Winds, which are frequent during Hurricane Season, will cause piles of Sand left on the ground to dissipate.

Hamlet

Sand can be acquired by hammering the Bag of Sand debris scattered around the player's spawn point.

"sand"
“It's a sandcastle, in the sand!”
–Wilson
“Big deal, it's sand.”
–Willow
“When Wolfgang holds it it slips through his large, strong hands.”
–Wolfgang
“I wonder if the sand knows of its own insignificance?”
–Wendy
“GRAINS OF DEFEATED ROCK”
–WX-78
“Sand always seems to find its way into my books.”
–Wickerbottom
“Sandy.”
–Woodie
“Rocks so thoroughly beaten down they are no longer recognizable.”
–Maxwell
“A fine grain, more useful for construction purposes than gardening.”
–Wagstaff
“Yöu are a very clean dirt.”
–Wigfrid
“It's nice to feel it beneath our many feet.”
–Webber
“I like it between my toes and nowhere else.”
–Walani
“Lots of tiny, tiny stones.”
–Warly
“Handful o'land.”
–Woodlegs
“ZOUNDS BUT SAND 'TIS EVERYWHERE!”
–Wilba
“Dirt”
–Wormwood
“I can fire it out my Pew-matic and it doesn't even gum up the works.”
–Wheeler
Sand is a resource found in the Shipwrecked DLC. Sand can be obtained by digging Sandy Piles found on the Beach biomes with a Shovel. Each use of Shovel will yield one pile of Sand, and full size Sandy Piles can be dug twice. Sandy Piles regenerate over time, making Sand renewable. Sand is an important resource early in the game, as it is required for crafting Chimineas, Buoyant Chimineas and Sandbags, which are structures that greatly help in surviving Hurricane Season and Monsoon Season respectively. It can also be used to craft a Sand Castle or a Sea Lab. Sand can also be refined into Empty Bottles.
Strong Winds, which are frequent during Hurricane Season, will cause piles of Sand left on the ground to dissipate.
Hamlet[edit | edit source]
Sand can be acquired by hammering the Bag of Sand debris scattered around the player's spawn point.

{{Pic|24|Bag of Sand|Crashed Balloon}} ({{Pic|24|Hammer}}) {{Pic|24|Hamlet icon}} |stack = 40}} {{Quotes |wilson = It's a sandcastle, in the sand! |willow = Big deal, it's sand. |wolfgang = When Wolfgang holds it it slips through his large, strong hands. |wendy = I wonder if the sand knows of its own insignificance? |wx78 = GRAINS OF DEFEATED ROCK |wickerbottom = Sand always seems to find its way into my books. |woodie = Sandy. |maxwell = Rocks so thoroughly beaten down they are no longer recognizable. |wagstaff = A fine grain, more useful for construction purposes than gardening. |webber = It's nice to feel it beneath our many feet. |wigfrid = Yöu are a very clean dirt. |walani = I like it between my toes and nowhere else. |warly = Lots of tiny, tiny stones. |woodlegs = Handful o'land. |wilba = ZOUNDS BUT SAND 'TIS EVERYWHERE! |wormwood = Dirt |wheeler = I can fire it out my Pew-matic and it doesn't even gum up the works. |choose = wx78 }} '''Sand''' is a resource found in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. Sand can be obtained by digging [[Sandy Pile]]s found on the [[Beach]] [[biome]]s with a [[Shovel]]. Each use of Shovel will yield one pile of Sand, and full size Sandy Piles can be dug twice. Sandy Piles regenerate over time, making Sand renewable. Sand is an important resource early in the game, as it is required for crafting [[Chiminea]]s, [[Buoyant Chiminea]]s and [[Sandbag]]s, which are structures that greatly help in surviving [[Hurricane Season]] and [[Monsoon Season]] respectively. It can also be used to craft a [[Sand Castle]] or a [[Sea Lab]]. Sand can also be refined into [[Empty Bottle]]s. [[Strong Winds]], which are frequent during [[Hurricane Season]], will cause piles of Sand left on the ground to dissipate. =={{Pic|32|Hamlet icon}} Hamlet== Sand can be acquired by hammering the [[Crashed Balloon|Bag of Sand]] debris scattered around the player's spawn point. =={{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage== {{Recipe |item1 = Sand |count1 = 3 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Empty Bottle}} {{Recipe |item1 = Sand |count1 = 2 |item2 = Limestone |count2 = 2 |item3 = log |count3 = 2 |result = Chiminea}} {{Recipe |item1 = Sand |count1 = 4 |item2 = Limestone |count2 = 6 |item3 = Tar |count3 = 6 |result = Buoyant Chiminea}} {{Recipe |item1 = Sand |count1 = 2 |item2 = Limestone |count2 = 4 |item3 = Electrical Doodad |count3 = 2 |tool = Science Machine |result = Sea Lab}} {{Recipe |item1 = Sand |count1 = 4 |item2 = Palm Leaf |count2 = 2 |item3 = Seashell |count3 = 3 |result = Sand Castle}} {{Recipe |item1 = Sand |count1 = 3 |item2 = Cloth |count2 = 2 |tool = Science Machine |result = Sand Bag |resultcount = 4}} {{Resources}} [[es:Arena]] [[Category:Resources]] [[Category:Non-Flammable]]
